title: bupleurum mongolicum
intro: Bupleurum mongolicum, also known as Chinese thunder of heaven, is a plant species in the family Apiaceae, commonly used in traditional Chinese medicine. The plant is rich in medicinal properties, including isobutylphthalide, which has anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. Bupleurum mongolicum has been found to have various health benefits, including reducing fever, alleviating symptoms of the common cold, and improving liver function. In herbal preparations, Bupleurum mongolicum is often combined with other herbs, such as glycyrrhiza and scutellaria, to create teas, decoctions, and granules that can be taken orally to harness its medicinal properties.
